notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. 5x9 lane field, 6 plant types (Sunflower, Pea Shooter, Wall-nut, Snow Pea, Repeater, Cherry Bomb) and 5 zombie types (Walker, Conehead, Bucket, Sprinter, Bruiser). 10-wave survival. Title screen with difficulty selector (Easy/Normal/Hard), HUD with sun economy + wave/score, plant tray with per-card cooldowns, pause overlay, settings (sound/music/quality/speed, persisted in localStorage), top-10 leaderboard (localStorage), WebAudio-synth SFX (place/shoot/hit/explode/sun/win/lose) + ambient triangle-wave music. House silhouette backdrop, lane mowers as last defense, particle FX, clickable DOM suns with dashed-ring decoration, HP bars with hue-shift slow indicator, screen-shake-ready design.
